## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content update (curriculum, agents, skills, reference docs)
- [ ] New feature (new skill, agent, exercise)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, hooks, tests)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes (604+ tests)
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] New content follows existing section patterns
- [ ] New agents include all required sections (Role Overview, Common Misconceptions, Level Calibration, etc.)
- [ ] New skills include scope blockquote (if overlapping with another skill)
- [ ] New content files include `last_reviewed` frontmatter
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if adding new skills or agents
